message:
test(tmux): add ScopedMux test helper and 3 tmux domain unit tests

Add proper test infrastructure and coverage for tmux control-mode
bootstrap flow:

tmux_commands.rs:
- ScopedMux helper struct that safely installs/restores the global Mux
  singleton with a static mutex guard and ScopedExecutor, preventing
  test races on the global state
- install_tmux_domain() convenience function
- test: session_changed_queues_list_commands_and_subscribes
- test: list_commands_result_queues_window_listing_for_session
- test: attach_done_process_result_marks_attach_state_done

localpane.rs:
- Replace stale TODO comment with description of actual bootstrap flow:
  SessionChanged -> ListCommands -> ListAllWindows -> ListAllPanes ->
  AttachDone

tmux.rs:
- Add comment explaining why attach() is intentionally a no-op
  (control-mode startup is bootstrapped by SessionChanged events)
- Minor formatting cleanup and import reordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
